tasks.label: fresh-dev
tasks.command: cd /d c:\Users\Housekeeping\astoria-chatbot && if exist .next\trace del /f /q .next\trace && if exist .next rmdir /s /q .next && npm run dev -- --port 3000

tasks.label: fresh-dev-3000
tasks.command: cd /d c:\Users\Housekeeping\astoria-chatbot; if (Test-Path .next\trace) { Remove-Item -Force .next\trace }; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; npm run dev -- --port 3000

tasks.label: fresh-dev-3000-clean
tasks.command: cd c:\Users\Housekeeping\astoria-chatbot; Remove-Item -Force .next\trace -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run dev -- --port 3000

tasks.label: kill-port-3000
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }

tasks.label: dev-on-3000
tasks.command: cd c:\Users\Housekeeping\astoria-chatbot; Remove-Item -Force .next\trace -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run dev -- --port 3000
